description.description: Description for the Neptune subnet group.

name.description: Name of the Neptune subnet group, must be unique within the AWS account and region.

name_prefix.description: Prefix to be used for the Neptune subnet group name, which must be unique and cannot be longer than 255 characters.

subnet_ids.description: List of subnet IDs to associate with the Neptune subnet group, must belong to the same VPC.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the resource; supports tagging for organization and management purposes.
